cere: noun. A fleshy, waxy area at the base of the upper beak in certain birds.
cerise: noun. A deep, bright red colour tinted with pink.
cries: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of cry
eerie: adjective. Inspiring fear, especially in a mysterious or shadowy way; strange, weird.
ers: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Ersu.
excise: noun. A tax charged on goods produced within the country (as opposed to customs duties, charged on goods from outside the country).
exec: noun. An executive; a person employed at the executive level.
exercise: noun. Any activity designed to develop or hone a skill or ability.
ice: symbol. ISO 639-2 /B language code for Icelandic.
ire: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Iresim.
ires: verb. third-person singular simple present indicative of ire
ree: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Rejang Kayan.
rei: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Reli.
resee: verb. To see again or anew.
rex: noun. A king, particularly in ancient Rome.
rice: noun. Cereal plants, Oryza sativa of the grass family whose seeds are used as food.
rise: verb. To move, or appear to move, physically upwards relative to the ground.
sec: symbol. Symbol of the trigonometric function secant.
see: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Seneca.
seer: noun. One who foretells the future; a clairvoyant, prophet, soothsayer or diviner.
sei: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Seri.
ser: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Serrano.
sex: noun. A category into which sexually - reproducing organisms are divided on the basis of their reproductive roles in their species; the
sexier: adjective. comparative form of sexy: more sexy
sic: symbol. Former ISO 639-3 language code for Malinguat.
sir: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Siri.
sire: noun. A lord, master, or other person in authority, most commonly used vocatively: formerly in speaking to elders and superiors, later only
six: noun. NATO & ICAO radiotelephony clear code (spelling-alphabet name) for the digit 6.
sri: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Siriano.
xeric: adjective. Very dry, lacking humidity and water.
xis: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Kisan.
